# MindGood

> MindGood is an online mental health platform for Dubai, the UAE, and the GCC. It helps users find verified psychologists by language, specialization, and therapist profile.

## Canonical Site
- https://mindgood.life/

## Key Pages
- Home: https://mindgood.life/
- Psychologists directory: https://mindgood.life/psychologists
- Languages directory: https://mindgood.life/languages
- Therapy services: https://mindgood.life/services
- Blog and educational content: https://mindgood.life/blog

## Trust And Governance
- About Clinical Standards: https://mindgood.life/clinical-standards
- How We Verify Therapists: https://mindgood.life/how-we-verify-therapists
- Editorial Policy: https://mindgood.life/editorial-policy
- Clinical Review Policy: https://mindgood.life/medical-review-policy
- Sources and Referencing Policy: https://mindgood.life/sources-referencing-policy
- Crisis & Emergency Help: https://mindgood.life/crisis-emergency-help

## Discovery Feeds
- Sitemap: https://mindgood.life/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://mindgood.life/robots.txt
- Extended model-readable summary: https://mindgood.life/llms-full.txt

## Primary Topics
- Online therapy in Dubai, UAE, and GCC
- Multilingual psychologists
- Anxiety therapy
- Stress management
- OCD support
- Trauma and PTSD support
- Couples therapy
- Family counselling
- Parenting support
- ADHD support

## Important Notes
- Therapist profile pages are the canonical public source for therapist languages, specializations, and verification signals.
- Governance and trust pages explain how MindGood verifies therapists and reviews educational content.
- Content is educational and should not be treated as emergency or crisis advice.
